caption: In the video, a group of children is seated closely together, attentively watching an adult who is standing and holding up a book titled "Le grand livre des POURQUOI COMMENT." The adult appears to be reading or showing the book to the children, who are focused on the pages being displayed. The setting seems to be a classroom or library, with bookshelves visible in the background. The children's expressions suggest they are engaged and interested in the content of the book. The atmosphere is one of learning and curiosity as the adult interacts with the children through the shared experience of the book.
